# Ajolote Labs — Full Reference

## What Ajolote Labs builds

Ajolote Labs is a forward-deployed AI infrastructure team. We embed engineers
inside operations-heavy companies and build the systems that turn manual
operations into AI-driven ones.

The work happens in three layers, in order:

1. **The Brain** — a unified, MCP-readable context layer over the tools the
   client already pays for. We don't replace the stack; we make it readable
   and act-on-able to AI in one interface. Privacy, consent, and audit
   controls are wired in from day one.
2. **AI Employees** — agents that run 24/7 against the brain. Booking,
   forecasting, reconciling, negotiating, reporting — agents do the work
   across the toolset, controlled in natural language, with outcome-tied
   metrics.
3. **Power Users** — the client's own team learns to command, customize, and
   deploy new agents themselves. The system compounds inside the company
   instead of staying dependent on Ajolote.

## Who it's for

Operations-heavy companies whose competitive surface is execution speed:
trade & distribution, financial services, healthcare ops, agriculture,
consumer brands, industrial SMEs.

## Engagements

### Cross-Border Spirits (TRADE & DISTRIBUTION)

A spirits CPG brand exporting across borders, working through distributors and
retailer networks. The cross-border supply chain has compounding inefficiencies
— retailer pricing variance, distributor reorder lag, inventory misallocation,
SKU-by-region demand misforecasts.

We built the brain that maps the brand's entire cross-border supply chain, and
the AI employees that catch pricing and margin leaks before a shipment leaves,
across systems that never used to talk to each other.

### Loyalty Platform (ENTERPRISE B2B)

A consumer-facing loyalty platform under operating pressure. An AI-native
turnaround: a company brain where AI employees find the next manual workflow,
automate it, and move to the next, so the operation gets leaner every month,
not just once.

## How engagements run

Five stages, every engagement, no exceptions:

1. **Discover** — map the stack, the team, the failure modes, the regulatory
   constraints.
2. **Build the Node** — build the brain (the unified context layer over the
   existing stack). The internal node is what makes the AI tier portable.
3. **Deploy Agents** — first AI employees deployed against the brain, with
   outcome-tied metrics from the start.
4. **Connect MCPs** — the brain connects outward to the other systems the
   client already uses.
5. **Operate with you** — Ajolote stays. Maintenance is the business model.
   We don't hand off and walk away.

## How to engage

A discovery call is the entry point: book at
https://calendly.com/hello-ajolotelabs.
